title: Roasted Polish Sausage and Potatoes
description: A hearty and flavorful dish featuring roasted Polish sausage and potatoes, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: 3. In a large bowl, toss the potatoes with olive oil, salt, and pepper until they are evenly coated.
4. Spread the potatoes on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until they are golden brown.
5. While the potatoes are roasting, slice the Polish sausage into 1-inch thick rounds.
6. In a large skillet, cook the sausage over medium-high heat until browned, about 5-7 minutes per side.
7. Remove the sausage from the skillet and set aside.
8. Add the roasted garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
9. Add the chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
10. Return the sausage to the skillet and simmer for 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
11. Serve the sausage and potatoes hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
